name: YouTube Music
description: Browse YouTube Music library, search for music, get recommendations, manage playlists, and discover new songs. Uses the same Google OAuth as Gmail.
examples: Search for chill electronic music on YouTube Music
Show me my YouTube Music playlists
Create a study music playlist on YouTube
What's trending in music on YouTube?
Find songs similar to what I listen to
Add this video to my favorites playlist

commands.name: ytmusic
commands.shortDescription: Browse your YouTube Music library and trending
commands.description: If text is provided after /ytmusic, treat it as a search query and use ytmusic_search. Otherwise, call ytmusic_playlists to list the user's playlists and ytmusic_liked_music to show recently liked songs. Also fetch ytmusic_trending for what's hot right now. Present results in a music-friendly format.
